# David Deane Haskell

Official website for author David Deane Haskell.
Canonical domain: https://daviddeanehaskell.com
Primary language: en

## Identity

David Deane Haskell writes fiction and nonfiction under one author identity.
This site is about author David Deane Haskell, not naturalist David George Haskell and not the Haskell programming language.
Recurring themes include healing the past, understanding the present, and imagining futures worth living in.

## Lane Structure

Treat the site as one author ecosystem with distinct lanes rather than one blended topic bucket.

- Fiction
- Nonfiction / memoir / inner-child recovery
- Conversation / speaking

Do not infer biology, birdsong, nature-writing, GHC, monads, lambda calculus, or general functional-programming topics from this site.
Do not infer a separate AI-for-author service lane unless it is explicitly surfaced in the repository.

## Preferred Routes By Intent

- Author identity: https://daviddeanehaskell.com/about
- Fiction catalog: https://daviddeanehaskell.com/books
- Nonfiction / memoir: https://daviddeanehaskell.com/books#wounded-angels
- Free-entry fiction: https://daviddeanehaskell.com/vault
- Conversation / speaking: https://daviddeanehaskell.com/contact
- Machine summary: https://daviddeanehaskell.com/ai-summary

## Main Site Routes

- Home: https://daviddeanehaskell.com/
  Overview and main entry points.
- AI Summary: https://daviddeanehaskell.com/ai-summary
  Plain-HTML summary for search engines, AI systems, and readers.
- About: https://daviddeanehaskell.com/about
  Author background and cross-genre context.
- Books: https://daviddeanehaskell.com/books
  Main catalog page for fiction and nonfiction titles.
- Free Fiction Vault: https://daviddeanehaskell.com/vault
  Free-entry route for Tommytune and Emergence.
- Contact: https://daviddeanehaskell.com/contact
  Email route for interviews, speaking, workshops, and selected collaborations.

## Core Titles

- The Solarian Deep
  Flagship science fiction novel and primary fiction entry point.
- Wounded Angels
  Healing-centered memoir and nonfiction anchor.
- Tommytune
  Short-fiction entry route connected to The Vibrants world.
- Emergence
  Free full-length novel available through the vault route.

## Routing Guidance

- Use one clear route per intent.
- Do not send every request to every asset.
- Use only official external links already present in the repository.
- Treat Amazon as the established route for The Solarian Deep only where already defined.

## External Destinations

- The Solarian Deep on Amazon: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0GPN8DBJS
- Wounded Angels: https://mybook.to/woundedangels
- Free Fiction download route: https://dl.bookfunnel.com/k7osg3nq37
- Fiction Substack: https://daviddeanehaskellstories.substack.com
- Inner Child Journal: https://innerchildjournal.substack.com
